candidates.why: Primary revenue line; matches top-line sales and equals Total Revenue figures without being a subtotal label.
Explicit total revenue line; duplicate of Revenue values and serves as a fallback if Revenue is missing in some years.

variables.notes: Use Revenue as primary; Total Revenue as backup per priority rule.

candidates.why: Direct cost of sales; standard COGS concept.
Operating overhead, not direct COGS; should be excluded per instructions.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Supplemental disclosure, not the main COGS line.
Appears to be an alternative staff cost disclosure, but no data and not clearly COGS-specific.
Balance sheet account, not period expense.
Inventory asset, not expense line.
Liability, not COGS.

variables.notes: Cost of sales is the clear COGS line; other candidates are overhead or financing items.

candidates.why: Typical SG&A personnel/overhead costs.
Non-COGS operating overhead; fits SG&A bucket.
Stock-based compensation, part of SG&A per instructions.
Share-based comp, which should be included in SG&A components.

variables.notes: Selected multiple overhead components as allowed; all are non-total operating expense components and exclude COGS and D&A.
No R&D-related row (e.g., research, development) appears in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet; treat XRD as 0.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; appears twice in preview but same label; use once as main series.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; part of total interest expense; good secondary series.
Explicit non-lease interest expense; complements lease interest line.
Interest capitalized; related to interest cost but not pure expense; lower priority backup if others missing.
Minority interest, not interest expense; should not be used.
Minority interest, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; usable as low-priority backup.
Debt balance, not an expense.
Debt balance, not an expense.
Equity, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest expense.
Appears to be interest cost related to capital lease maturity schedule; can serve as a very low-priority backup.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list: main Interest Expense first, then split components (excl leases, lease interest), then supplemental and capitalized interest, and finally Interest Cost as last-resort backup. Debt balance and minority interest lines are excluded.

candidates.why: Income statement item, not equity balance.
Component of equity, but not total equity required for BE.
Represents shareholders’ equity; appropriate proxy for book equity denominator.
Technical balancing row, not the core equity figure.
Balancing line, not actual equity amount.
Balancing line, not actual equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity balance.
Sum of equity and liabilities; not pure equity.

variables.notes: Use Total equity as book equity. Parent/owner equity appears to be the first Total equity before non-controlling interests; label matches candidate list. MIB is mapped separately, but BE uses Total equity per instructions.

candidates.why: Minority interest in income; not the balance-sheet MIB but confirms presence of NCI concept.
Minority interest income line; again confirms NCI but not the balance sheet stock.
Primary balance sheet line for minority interest / NCI; best MIB mapping.
Alternative label for same NCI concept; good backup series.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minorities, not the equity balance.

variables.notes: Mapped to balance-sheet NCI lines; provided as priority list with Non-controlling interests first and Minority Interest as backup.
